DP.352.0000:
We’re here to make sure Snowpoint’s
Gym Leader doesn’t disturb us!
DP.352.0001:
You’re here to see the lake Pokémon,
too?\f
You must be bored to fight your
way through the snow to get here...
DP.352.0002:
Standing guard is a very important
assignment!\f
I’ll make this a success and earn
myself a CLEFAIRY!
DP.352.0003:
The Pokémon of the three lakes
appear to be connected somehow.\f
When they blew up Lake Valor,
a cavern appeared in the middle of\r
this lake!
